answer: June 12 net margin dropped because the pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments by joining on sku; roll back ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger and rebuild margin_daily from order_line_id-deduplicated rows.

facts.remediation: Roll back ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger and rebuild margin_daily from order_line_id-deduplicated order line ledger rows.
facts.root_cause: The pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments because it joined adjustment rows to order lines by sku instead of order_line_id.
